name: local-rag
description: Fully-local semantic search: a bin/rag CLI that chunks + embeds a corpus with ollama and indexes it with turbovec. Notes-first, corpus-agnostic via pluggable loaders.

embed_model.title: Embedding model
embed_model.description: ollama model used to embed chunks and queries

ollama_host.title: Ollama host
ollama_host.description: Base URL of the ollama server
